Headline: O'Hare-bound Blue Line Service Delayed at Racine
ShortDescription: O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing at Racine due to a sick passenger. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing at Racine due to a sick passenger.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#7 Harrison

#126 Jackson

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
